stat_block.text:
Also known as portable walls, these thick and heavy shields are slightly larger than tower shields. Like tower shields, they're typically made from wood reinforced with metal, but many are made from larger amounts of metal or even stone.  
   
 2 Getting the higher bonus for a fortress shield requires using the Take Cover action while the shield is raised.

traits.name: Hefty
traits.text: A hefty shield is so heavy that raising it takes more effort. Raising a Shield with the hefty trait is a two-action activity unless your Strength modifier equals or exceeds the number with the trait.
